# Keyrings (populated by preflight.sh)

These directories are populated by `./image_build/preflight.sh` (the deps step).
Each is a git clone of an upstream archive keyring repository:

- `debian/`  — https://salsa.debian.org/release-team/debian-archive-keyring.git
- `ubuntu/`  — https://git.launchpad.net/ubuntu/+source/ubuntu-keyring
- `radxa/`   — https://github.com/radxa-pkg/radxa-archive-keyring.git
- `vscodium/` — https://gitlab.com/paulcarroty/vscodium-deb-rpm-repo.git
